summary: Iteration 15: All 5 fixes verified - Category filter fix (categoryId param), PWA install button, Back button, Top nav UI, Multi-select transfers. 10/10 backend tests passed. All frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Analytics endpoint returns category_id in category_breakdown
Backend: Analytics endpoint works with date range filters
Backend: Transactions endpoint returns proper structure
Backend: Categories endpoint returns proper structure
Backend: Detect transfers endpoint returns potential_transfers with txn1/txn2 structure
Backend: Mark-as-transfer endpoint handles invalid IDs gracefully
Backend: Accounts endpoint returns proper structure
Backend: Analytics requires authentication (401)
Backend: Transactions requires authentication (401)
Backend: Detect transfers requires authentication (401)
Frontend: Top nav bar shows MoneyInsights logo
Frontend: View toggle button shows 'Tracker' mode
Frontend: Top navigation tabs container present
Frontend: Settings gear icon in top nav
Frontend: User logout button in top nav
Frontend: Tracker view tabs (Dashboard, Accounts, Transactions, Upload, Categories)
Frontend: View toggle switches to Accounting view (/accounting URL)
Frontend: Accounting view tabs (Dashboard, Chart of Accounts, Vouchers, Daybook, Trial Balance, Reports)
Frontend: Income card navigates to /transactions?from=dashboard&type=credit
Frontend: Back button appears when from=dashboard in URL
Frontend: Back button navigates to dashboard
Frontend: Expense card navigates to /transactions?from=dashboard&type=debit
Frontend: Category click navigates with categoryId param
Frontend: Transactions page reads categoryId from URL and selects category in dropdown
Frontend: Chart type selector (Bar/Line/Area) works for trend chart
Frontend: Settings page has PWA Install button
Frontend: PWA install instructions for Android/iOS/Desktop present
Frontend: Detect Transfers button works
Frontend: Potential Transfers tab present
Frontend: Mobile menu shows all navigation items
Frontend: Pie chart shows percentage labels on slices (74%, 14%, 5%)
Frontend: Legend shows percentage badges (73.7%, 13.6%, 4.6%)
critical_code_review_comments: Category filter fix: Dashboard.js now passes categoryId param instead of search text
Transactions.js reads categoryId from URL params and sets filterCategory state
Back button: Shows when from=dashboard is in URL params, navigates to /
Top nav UI: Sidebar replaced with horizontal top navigation bar
View toggle: Button in top bar switches between Tracker and Accounting modes
PWA install: Settings page has Install App (PWA) button with platform-specific instructions
Multi-select transfers: Checkboxes, Select All, Mark Selected as Transfer, Dismiss Selected buttons implemented
Analytics endpoint returns category_id in category_breakdown for proper filtering
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 verified 5 fixes: 1) Category filter now uses categoryId URL param instead of text search - Dashboard passes categoryId, Transactions reads it and selects category in dropdown, 2) PWA Install button replaces APK download in Settings with instructions for Android/iOS/Desktop, 3) Back button appears when navigating from Dashboard (from=dashboard param) and navigates to /, 4) Top navigation bar replaces sidebar - horizontal tabs with view toggle button, mobile still has burger menu, 5) Multi-select transfers UI implemented with checkboxes, Select All, Mark Selected as Transfer, Dismiss Selected buttons (no transfers detected in test data). Pie chart shows percentage labels on slices and in legend. All 10 backend tests passed. All frontend features working correctly.

multi_select_transfers.checkboxes_present: UI ready (no transfers in test data)
